Node started: Calculate the partition function Z(x, T) for a freely jointed chain of n segments of length l extended to a total end-to-end distance x. Provide the expression for the entropy S(x, T) as a function of x, n, l, and T.

Node started: Given the entropy S(x, T) and the internal energy U(T) of a freely jointed chain, derive the adiabatic constraint S(x, T) = constant. Use this to find the relationship between temperature T and extension x during an adiabatic process. Then, use the relation F = -dU/dx (at constant S) or F = T(dS/dx) to find the force F(x).
